member.name: M:Network.#ctor(ExecutorService,System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,AccountId})
member.summary:
The protobuf address book converted into a map of node account IDs to NodeAddress
This variable is package private so tests can use it

member.name: P:Network.MaxNodesPerRequest
member.summary: Assign the maximum nodes to be returned for each request.

member.name: M:Network.Min(MaxNodesPerRequest.,Network.)
member.summary: Extract the number of nodes for each request.
member.returns: the number of nodes for each request

member.name: M:Network.GetNodeAccountIdsForExecute
member.summary: <summary> Pick 1/3 of the nodes sorted by health and expected delay from the network. This is used by Query and Transaction for selecting node AccountId's. </summary> <returns>{@link java.util.List<AccountId>}</returns>
